                                      {%- set ns.prev_message_type = 'image' -%}
                                  {%- elif item['type'] == 'audio' -%}
                                      {{- '<|audio|>' -}}
                                      {%- set ns.prev_message_type = 'audio' -%}
                                  {%- elif item['type'] == 'video' -%}
